meaning: n.概念,观念,想法,意见,打算,主张,(复数)<美语>小饰物
examples: She had only a vague notion of what might happen.
It might be considered heresy to suggest such a notion.
I still believe in the notion of an egalitarian society.
But to some observers, the notion of having Stoudemire work on three-pointers might seem foreign.
The notion that our elected leadership can't do the same thing is mind-boggling to them.
